chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-914 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- None present for the Petitioner. Matter pertains to declaration of Watercourse. All these issues have been decided by this Court in a Judgment reported in SBLR 2021 Sindh 881. Petition is dismissed leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his Remedy as per Law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
